name: API Gateway
documentation: FastAPI REST API layer (IL-046). 78 endpoints across 21 routers.

name: Safeguarding Service
documentation: CASS 15 safeguarding: daily reconciliation, breach detection, FIN060 return. Sprint 12.

name: Tri-Party Reconciliation Engine
documentation: CASS 7.15.17R daily tri-party recon: rails vs Midaz GL vs safeguarding bank. GAP-010.

name: KYC Service
documentation: KYC workflow lifecycle: create → documents → EDD → approve/reject. Ballerine adapter.

name: Payment Service
documentation: FPS + SEPA CT + SEPA Instant via Modulr sandbox. Webhook signature verification.

name: AML / Fraud Service
documentation: FraudAML pipeline with Jube (self-hosted ML). PSR APP 2024 compliant.

name: IAM Service
documentation: Keycloak OIDC + RBAC. MockIAMAdapter for tests. KeycloakAdapter for production.

name: Ledger Service
documentation: Midaz CBS adapter. get_balance(), create_transaction(), list_transactions(). S13-01.

name: OpenClaw moa-bot
documentation: Telegram/HTTP bot @mycarmi_moa_bot. MLRO operator assistant. GMKtec :18789.

name: OpenClaw ctio-bot
documentation: Telegram/HTTP bot for CTIO (Oleg). GMKtec :18791.

name: Banxe Screener
documentation: Moov Watchman + PEP wrapper. OFAC/UN/EU/UK sanctions + PEP screening. GMKtec :8085.

name: Yente / OpenSanctions
documentation: OpenSanctions primary sanctions/PEP database (200K+ entities). MIT licence. GMKtec :8086. Phase 3 target.

name: PII Proxy / Presidio
documentation: Microsoft Presidio GDPR PII anonymisation proxy. MIT licence. GMKtec :8089.

name: Deep Search
documentation: Compliance research service. GMKtec :8088.

name: Auto-Verify API
documentation: Agent response verification API. GMKtec :8094.

name: Hyperswitch App Server
documentation: Payment orchestration and switch. Apache 2.0. Sprint 9 (P0: env fix). GMKtec :8096.

name: Hyperswitch Control Center
documentation: Payment operations dashboard. Apache 2.0. Sprint 9. GMKtec :8097.

name: Hyperswitch Card Vault
documentation: PCI-compliant card tokenisation storage. Apache 2.0. Sprint 9 (P0: env fix). GMKtec :8098.

name: Customer Onboarding
documentation: EMR 2011 Reg.4 — customer creation + KYC + agreement lifecycle.

name: Daily Reconciliation
documentation: CASS 7.15.17R — daily internal (Midaz) vs external (CAMT.053) reconciliation. Cron at 23:50 UTC.

name: SAR Filing
documentation: POCA 2002 s.330 — Suspicious Activity Report lifecycle: file → MLRO approve → submit NCA.

name: Transaction Monitoring
documentation: Real-time transaction screening via Jube probabilistic ML engine. PSR APP 2024 / MLR 2017.

name: Sanctions Screening
documentation: OFAC/UN/EU/UK sanctions and PEP check. Triggered at onboarding and on each payment. MLR 2017 Reg.28.

name: Payment Processing
documentation: FPS/SEPA payment lifecycle: initiate → screen → authorise → settle → notify. PSR 2017.

name: Consumer Duty DISP
documentation: FCA DISP complaints handling under Consumer Duty (PS22/9). 3-day acknowledgement + 8-week resolution SLA.

name: FIN060 Return
documentation: FCA regulatory return FIN060 — safeguarding funds report. Annual submission via RegData.

name: Midaz CBS
documentation: Core Banking System. Self-hosted on GMKtec :8095. Double-entry GL ledger. Apache 2.0. Sprint 8.

name: Keycloak IAM
documentation: Keycloak 26.2.5 OIDC. Realm: banxe. GMKtec :8180. 7 roles.

name: ClickHouse Audit DB
documentation: Append-only audit trail. TTL 5 years (FCA MLR 2017 I-08). Tables: safeguarding_events, recon_events. :8123/9000.

name: Marble Case Management
documentation: Self-hosted Apache 2.0 case management. MLRO inbox, case assignment. GMKtec :5002. I-19: internal only.

name: Ollama
documentation: LLM inference server. Primary model: qwen3-banxe-v2 (~30b-a3b). AMD ROCm. GMKtec :11434. MIT licence.

name: Jube TM
documentation: Probabilistic transaction monitoring engine. Self-hosted. AGPLv3. GMKtec :5001.

name: PostgreSQL (compliance)
documentation: Compliance database. PEP records (14,491), KYB entities. PostgreSQL licence. GMKtec :5432.

name: PostgreSQL (Jube)
documentation: Jube TM internal database. PostgreSQL licence. GMKtec :15432.

name: PostgreSQL (Marble)
documentation: Marble case management database. PostgreSQL licence. GMKtec :15433.

name: Redis
documentation: Velocity monitoring cache. 24h TTL. BSD licence. GMKtec :6379.

name: Redis (Jube)
documentation: Jube TM internal cache. BSD licence. GMKtec :16379.

name: n8n
documentation: Workflow automation (developer tooling). Fair-code licence. GMKtec :5678.

name: nginx
documentation: Reverse proxy and Web UI gateway. MIT licence. GMKtec :443/:80.

name: Firebase Emulator
documentation: Firebase auth emulator for Marble local mode. Apache 2.0. GMKtec :9099/:4000.

name: MongoDB (Midaz)
documentation: Midaz metadata store. rs0 replica set. SSPL licence. GMKtec :5703. Sprint 8.

name: RabbitMQ (Midaz)
documentation: Midaz async transaction queue. MPL 2.0. GMKtec :3003 (HTTP mgmt) / :3004 (AMQP). Sprint 8.

name: TransactionRecord
documentation: Immutable transaction record. amount_gbp: Decimal (I-05). status: APPROVED|PENDING|CANCELLED.

name: CustomerProfile
documentation: Customer entity with KYC status, risk tier, agreement refs. PII fields encrypted at rest.
